description:
This quiz assesses knowledge of modern CSS concepts and best practices, gauging the ability to articulate CSS expertise on a résumé. It is positioned at an intermediate difficulty level with a light‑hearted, encouraging tone that nudges learners to reflect on their skill depth. The format is multiple‑choice, aiming to reinforce confidence in CSS proficiency.
Topics: CSS fundamentals, modern layout techniques (Flexbox, Grid), responsive design, CSS preprocessors and tooling, best practices for styling and maintainability
Audience: Front‑end developers, web designers, and students who want to validate and showcase their CSS knowledge for career advancement.
